data.body: Investigation (cluster B, sonnet, KERNEL): Taxonomy #5 + #13 Phantom Capability Hallucination. ROOT_CAUSE: reviewer-base.md Step 1 re-derives REPO_ROOT via `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — in worktree sub-agent context this returns the main repo path (not the worktree), and relative .claude/artifacts/ writes land in main repo instead of session-scoped /tmp dir. Sub-agent assumes .claude/artifacts/ is always safe relative target; true only when CWD = worktree. PROPOSED_FIXES: (a) reviewer-base.md Step 3: add `export WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR="$ARTIFACTS_DIR"` before write-reviewer-findings.sh call — pins write path to orchestrator's artifacts dir via the already-supported env override (deps.sh line 267). (b) .gitignore: add `.claude/artifacts/review-status` as belt-and-suspenders guard. Confidence: high. Minimal-fix applied: true.
